description: Two unrelated legal deeds written by the judge Avraham b. Yizhaq ha-Talmid. The longer one is a deed of sale of a female slave, dated Tammuz 1405 sel. (summer 1094). The shorter one is a partial report on the misbehavior of several family members from Malij, summoned to court over a conflict with their community members. In court they cursed, shouted and threatened to apostatize. See Goitein notes and index card linked below. Edition in Yagur's dissertation, # 24
description_he: מסמך משפטי ביהודית-ערבית מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
